name: Claude Skills & Plugins
description: 170+ production-ready skills and plugins for Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Gemini CLI, and OpenClaw. Includes customer success management, dependency auditing, system design, compliance, product strategy, and enterprise engineering patterns.
review: Comprehensive collection of 170+ production-ready skills across engineering, product, compliance, and C-level domains. Well-maintained, actively developed, and security-audited. Professional patterns with zero external dependencies for core skills.
